activation.title: Enter Activation Code
activation.description: Enter your activation code to unlock a course or learning program.
activation.successMessage: Your code has been successfully redeemed. New content has been unlocked.
activation.errorRedeeming: There was an error redeeming the code. Please try again later.
activation.loginRequired: Please log in to redeem an activation code.

hero.title: Master
hero.desc: Comprehensive online learning platform with HSK 1-6 roadmaps. AI pronunciation practice, smart Flashcards, and high-quality video lectures.

dashboard.title: Continue your course
dashboard.subtitle: Resume the next lesson and track completion across your enrolled courses.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Open an enrolled course to start tracking progress.
dashboard.startRecommendedDesc: Start with the next available lesson in your enrolled courses.
dashboard.courseProgressDesc: Search, filter, and reopen the right course without leaving the dashboard.
dashboard.quickActionsDesc: Jump into the next student workflow.
dashboard.recentWorkDesc: Resume the latest practice or exam attempt from your learning history.
dashboard.recentWorkError: Cannot load recent work right now.
dashboard.recentWorkEmpty: No practice or exam attempts yet.
dashboard.recentExamDesc: Latest exam attempts and in-progress work.
dashboard.sessionValue: {count, plural, =0 {0 sessions} one {# session} other {# sessions}}
dashboard.streakValue: {days, plural, =0 {0 days} one {# day} other {# days}}
dashboard.noPerformanceDataDesc: Start practicing or take an exam to see your performance metrics here.
dashboard.accuracyByUnitDesc: How well you're doing in each chapter of the course.
dashboard.skillMasteryDesc: Mastery level based on your answers across all sessions.
dashboard.activityCalendarDesc: Daily study activity across your enrolled courses.
dashboard.activityCalendarEmpty: No activity recorded in the last 14 days.

features.whyUsDesc: Modern learning methods combined with AI technology help you remember vocabulary 300% longer than traditional methods.

hsk.title: Standard HSK Roadmap
hsk.desc: Lessons are designed closely following the latest HSK curricula from HSK 1 to HSK 6.

library.title: Massive Library
library.desc: Over 5000 video lectures, 10,000 flashcards, and a rich repository of practice exams.

community.title: Vibrant Community
community.desc: Connect with thousands of other students and compete in weekly rankings.

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.sampleDesc: In this lesson, we will take the first steps on the journey to master Chinese. You will learn how to pronounce basic initials and finals, and how to greet others politely.
goalItems: Know how to greet people socially
lesson.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
lesson.notFoundDesc: The lesson you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
lesson.loadError: Cannot load this lesson right now.
lesson.simulationGreeting: Hello! I am your AI roleplay assistant for this lesson. Are you ready to begin?
lesson.simulationReply: Good response. I am reviewing it against the roleplay scenario.

quiz.testKnowledge: Test your knowledge of the current topic.
quiz.noQuestions: No quiz questions available for this lesson.

auth.loginDesc: Continue your Chinese mastery journey with us.
auth.registerDesc: Learn with a vibrant community of 10,000+ students.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.terms: By registering, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with your new password.
auth.forgotEmailSentDesc: If your email exists in our system, you will receive a reset link shortly.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your personal information and security settings.

security.title: Security
security.description: Update your password to protect your account.
security.changeSuccess: Password changed successfully. Please log in again.
security.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: List of devices currently logged into your account.
sessions.revokeError: Failed to log out device. Please try again.
